title: Investors brace for a 'long grind' as Iran war escalation dims hopes of an early end to hostilities
summary_full: As U.S. and Iranian forces continue exchanging strikes, investors are increasingly grappling with the possibility that the conflict could become more prolonged.
summary_public: As U.S. and Iranian forces continue exchanging strikes, investors are increasingly grappling with the possibility that the conflict could become more prolonged.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war escalation dims hopes of an early end to hostilities
